comment.body: Why do we have to mix everything up? I don’t get it. If buyers(not ‘investors’) are buying vvol, dealers will reflexively push it higher. And if buyers are shorting vvol, the dealers’ hedging flow will push it down. But these dynamics don’t flip in a sec. The fact that vol down&vvol down really just signals that VIX vannas turned negative. And Alma stressed in her weekly that beyond a certain level the downside gravitational effect doesn’t apply. Think of it like a spectral transition that moves with the vol changes
comment.raw_body: Why do we have to mix everything up? I don’t get it. If buyers(not ‘investors’) are buying vvol, dealers will reflexively push it higher. And if buyers are shorting vvol, the dealers’ hedging flow will push it down. But these dynamics don’t flip in a sec. The fact that vol down&vvol down really just signals that VIX vannas turned negative. And Alma stressed in her weekly that beyond a certain level the downside gravitational effect doesn’t apply. comment.body: She said 6060 gamma was supportive. Volatility didn’t catch up, so the level held and risk premia were sold. As the market approached that level, vol calmed down and the supportive gamma effect increased. The 6088 pivot was tested and broken..vol still didn’t catch up, but it didn’t make lower lows either. When it was retested, a structure formed and boom it became support. Check the provided OD map: 6085 is magnetic, as is 6100.. according to Alma’s chart..and for a spike up to 6130, vol will actually need to catch up
